PowerShell(Get-Command php, ruby, deno, bun, caddy, nginx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; [System.Net.HttpListener]::IsSupported)

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -ne $PID } | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-15\) } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "cleaned up")
